text: Our future is as bright as your smile, Kashish. ✨
I promise to build you a bookshelf that reaches the ceiling. 🏡
Swiss Alps trip is waiting for us in 2027! 🏔️
Kashish, you are my favorite tomorrow. 🌅
I want to watch the starry skies of Iceland with you. 🌌
Spontaneous street food runs will never stop. 🍿
I promise to learn cooking your favorite noodles perfectly. 🍜
Kashish, your hand is my favorite thing to hold. 🤝
A lifetime is too short to spend with you. ⏳
I will always carry the heavy bags on our travels, my love. 🎒
Coffee cups on lazy Sunday mornings. ☕
Dancing in the living room under fairy lights. 💃
Kashish, you are my dream come true. 🌠
I promise to always listen, even to your silent thoughts. 👂
We will have a garden full of plants named after us. 🌿
Watching the autumn leaves fall in Central Park. 🍂
Wiping cake cream off your nose at eighty. 🎂
Kashish, my heart is completely safe in your hands. 🔒
Spontaneous road trips to the beaches at midnight. 🚗
Sharing a cozy woolen blanket on winter nights. ❄️
I promise to celebrate you every single day, not just birthdays. 🎉
Connecting the stars to spell your name: K-A-S-H-I-S-H. ☄️
May your beautiful eyes never shed a tear of sadness. 👁️
You are my today, my tomorrow, and my absolute forever. ♾️
I still choose you, over and over, Kashish. 💞
Growing old, wrinkled, and happy by your side. 👵👴
I promise to stand by your career goals, cheerleader-in-chief! 📣
Our little balcony is the best cafe in the world. ☕
Thank you for entering my life and making it a fairytale. 🏰
Happy Birthday, my beautiful star. Here is to our dreams! 🥂
